tooltips.restore_from_drive: Restores a previous backup from Google Drive

auth_login.subtitle: Enter your master password to unlock your vault.
auth_login.forgot_dialog_body: If you forgot your master password, the only way to access your vault is to delete all data from the device and restore from a backup (if available). For your privacy, your password is not stored anywhere.
auth_login.master_password_tooltip: The main password you use to unlock your vault
auth_login.biometric_tooltip: Quick login with fingerprint or face recognition

welcome.title: Welcome to Guarden
welcome.subtitle: Your bank accounts, digital subscriptions, and all passwords are now secure. Let us create your personal offline vault.
